figures.caption: FIG. 1. Field configurations of a vortex located at ra = 0 with q = +1 [(a),(b)] and an antivortex with q = −1 [(c),(d)], obtained from Eq. (3) by imposing the boundary condition h(|r| → ∞) → 0. In (b) and (d), contour levels of the magnetic field h(x, y) are shown in red, while black dashed lines indicate reference circles highlighting the elliptical shape of the h(x, y) profiles. The altermagnetic parameter is set to KΦ0/(2πλ 2 L) = 0.2.

FIG. 3. (a): Spatial map of the pinning centers used in the calculations, Npc = 4. (b),(c): Field dependencies of the vortex number nV (H) for a superconducting film with (b) and without (c) the altermagnetic order according to the energy functional given by Eqs. (6) and (5). For |H| < Hc1 ∝ Φ0/(2πλ 2 L), vortices do not enter the sample.
